page: Microsoft Azure E20ds_v7 is an Edsv7-family virtual machine running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 20 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 10 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 6973P-C x86_64 processor operating at 4.2 GHz. The processor includes a 480 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX). This instance is equipped with 160.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.
For local storage, the instance includes a bundled 1181 GB local disk and is Premium Storage capable. It does not feature any GPU hardware accelerators.

In benchmark evaluations, the E20ds_v7 demonstrates top-tier performance in single-threaded compression tasks, achieving 35.47 GB/sec in gzip compression and 14.71 GB/sec in bzip3 decompression. Other metrics fall within the average tier, including a stress-ng multi-core CPU score of 20081.26 and a PassMark CPU score of 33317.5. Large-block memory bandwidth is measured at 141.96 GB/sec for read operations and 58.49 GB/sec for write operations. Database operations on PassMark score 10336.74, while Redis SET operations reach 34.81 million operations per second.

Given its high memory density and dedicated Intel Xeon compute resources, the E20ds_v7 offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive workloads that do not require GPU acceleration. The combination of 160.0 GB RAM, a 1181 GB local disk, and strong single-threaded compression performance makes this instance suitable for relational databases, in-memory caching systems, data indexing, and enterprise applications requiring substantial memory capacity per core.
description: The Microsoft Azure E20ds_v7 is an Edsv7-family virtual machine powered by a 20-vCPU Intel Xeon 6973P-C x86_64 processor running at 4.2 GHz on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 160.0 GB of RAM, providing a high 8.0 GB of memory per vCPU, alongside a bundled 1181 GB local disk. While it lacks GPU acceleration, the instance delivers top-tier single-threaded compression performance, reaching 35.47 GB/sec in gzip benchmarks, alongside average-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth results. With its high memory-to-vCPU ratio and dedicated compute resources, the E20ds_v7 is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-bound enterprise workloads. It is well-suited for relational databases, in-memory caches like Redis, and data-processing tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E20ds_v7 is an Edsv7 virtual machine featuring 20 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 160 GB of RAM, and a 1181 GB local disk, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and databases.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E20ds_v7 is a memory-optimized VM with 20 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 160 GB RAM, and 1181 GB local storage for database workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors, high-capacity RAM, and local storage for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: 20 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs operating at 4.2 GHz
160.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per vCPU
Bundled 1181 GB local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier single-threaded gzip and bzip3 compression performance
Suitable for relational databases, in-memory caching, and data indexing
